title: Complicated Backpacks
description: This Mod adds Backpacks to Minecraft
body: ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a458b1dbaf74e72c473b0afd82d97461d32ea5e.png) # This Mod Adds Backpacks To Minecraft There is **6** types of Backpacks - Leather Backpack - Iron Backpack - Gold Backpack - Emerald Backpack - Diamond Backpack - Netherite Backpack Every Backpack has **unique** Crafting Recipe Every Backpack is **Better** than Other ## Support Me https://buymeacoffee.com/marshlaw
